creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Were you thinking of writing an rc script for this to run it as a daemon?
https://people.freebsd.org/~olivierd/porters-handbook/rc-scripts.html

I wrote one for a port I maintain awhile, ago and maybe of some help.
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/net/htpdate/files/htpdate.in

Also, there is a note in README that is a little unnerving.. Have you performed or reached out to any one for reviewing of this code, as I am leaning that way based on this comment.

 IS THIS SECURE?                                                                   |
|    No idea, i used snprintf() and strncpy() so there are not buffer overflows     |
|    But don't trust this thing a lot.                                            

-jgh
